case_title: NORTHEAST COMMUNITY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS PHAM, VAN LUYEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY NORTHEAST COMMUNITY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT PHAM, VAN LUYEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
